location: Dropped by a Lesser Cemetery Shade in a hidden clearing below the chariot path inside Gelmir Hero's Grave, Mt. Gelmir.
tactics: Reach Gelmir Hero's Grave from the First Mt. Gelmir Campsite grace (a Stonesword Key is needed to fully unseal the dungeon)
Time your drop off the crossed wooden rafters over the chariot track to land in the clearing below, where the Lesser Cemetery Shade waits

This is a one-time-only drop: if you kill it, walk away, or reload without grabbing the sword, it will not respawn on that playthrough — don't get distracted by the nearby Grave Glovewort pickup and forget the weapon
The Shade itself isn't very dangerous alone, but lingering on the chariot track risks getting run over
lore: Wielded by the insect-infested Cemetery Shades who guard the old graves, this sword carries a thin, sharp edge at each end; its strong attack unfurls the blade outward for a slash with unusual reach.

builds.name: Reach-focused Strength/Dexterity build
builds.why: Its unfolding strong attacks give it the longest effective reach of any curved sword despite a short base blade, rewarding a spacing-heavy playstyle.
